    import flyte
    
    # 1. Setup

    # 2. Task: generate_dataset
    @env.task
    async def generate_dataset(n_samples: int, n_features: int) -> dict:
        return {
            "X": [[float(i + j) for j in range(n_features)] for i in range(n_samples)],
            "y": [i % 2 for i in range(n_samples)],
            "n_samples": n_samples,
            "n_features": n_features,
